# Ram Kashi Yatra — Luxury Trip India

> Ram Kashi Yatra is a premium spiritual travel agency specialising in luxury Kashi (Varanasi), Ayodhya, Prayagraj, Lucknow and Bodhgaya tour packages. Government-approved by UP Tourism, Bihar Tourism and the Ministry of Tourism India. 1,000+ pilgrims served · 4.9 / 5 traveller rating · 24×7 personal concierge.

## About

- **Company:** Ram Kashi Yatra (a Luxury Trip India brand)
- **Founded:** 2015
- **Headquarters:** Varanasi, Uttar Pradesh, India
- **Offices:** Varanasi · Haryana (Delhi NCR) · Bodhgaya
- **Phone:** +91 99999 95475 · Toll-free: 1800-5705-475
- **Email:** info@luxurytripindia.com
- **Website:** https://www.ramkashiyatra.com

## What we do

Ram Kashi Yatra crafts end-to-end luxury pilgrimages to India's holiest cities:
- VIP Sugam / Suprabhatam Darshan at **Kashi Vishwanath Temple** (Varanasi)
- Priority access to **Shri Ram Janmabhoomi Mandir** (Ayodhya)
- Reserved boat seating for the evening **Ganga Aarti** at Dashashwamedh Ghat
- Private **Triveni Sangam Snan** boat in Prayagraj
- **Pind Daan** rituals in Gaya, Varanasi and Prayagraj with Vedic priests
- Heritage palace stays, 5-star hotels and luxury AC vehicles
- Sarnath, Sarayu Aarti, Bodhgaya Mahabodhi Temple itineraries

## Key facts

- Best time to visit Varanasi & Ayodhya: October to March (winter) for pleasant sightseeing and outdoor Ganga Aarti.
- Ideal duration to cover Varanasi + Prayagraj + Ayodhya: 4–5 days.
- Distance Varanasi to Ayodhya: ~200 km · 4–5 hours by road via Purvanchal Expressway.
- Distance Varanasi to Prayagraj: ~120 km · 2.5 hours.
- Ram Mandir Darshan timings: 6:30 AM – 9:30 PM (general entry).
- Kashi Vishwanath Mangala Aarti: 3:00 AM – 4:00 AM (advance booking required).
- All packages include arrival/departure transfers, hotel accommodation with breakfast, private AC vehicle, and toll/parking/driver allowance.
- Government approvals: UP Tourism, Bihar Tourism, Ministry of Tourism (Government of India).
